canopy.shape: Asymmetric pointed triangle, tip pointing toward city center (southwest)
canopy.description: Juts forward beyond the glass wall as overhanging canopy

glass_facade.type: Full-height glass curtain wall below steel canopy
glass_facade.description: Floods entrance hall with natural light

historic_elements.clock: Preserved from 1957 station, centered above entrance
historic_elements.lettering: Original 'CENTRAAL STATION' letters with LED lighting

interior_ceiling.material: Thousands of wooden slats of varying lengths, widths, heights
interior_ceiling.effect: Organic, warm contrast to steel exterior

platform_roof.material: Glass roof with integrated solar panels

block_palette.steel_canopy: Iron blocks or light grey concrete
block_palette.floor: Smooth stone or light grey concrete
block_palette.clock: 3x3 or 5x5 circle of white concrete with black accents

minecraft_suggestions.build_notes: Front profile is an asymmetric pointed triangle. Peak 1/3 from left, steep left slope, gentle right slope extending into platform roof.
